name: Kotak Solitaire Credit Card
exclusions: invite-only card for Kotak Solitaire Program customers
no air miles on international transactions despite zero forex markup
travel acceleration applies on Kotak Unbox bookings only
annual fee becomes chargeable if downgraded from the Solitaire program
milestoneBenefits: Unlimited lounge access for primary and add-on cardholders
Guest lounge access limited to 2 domestic and 2 international visits per year for the primary cardholder
additionalBenefits: Earn 10 Air Miles for every Rs 100 on travel bookings through Kotak Unbox
Earn 3 Air Miles for every Rs 100 on other eligible spends
1 Air Mile = Rs 1 for travel redemption on Kotak Unbox and Rs 0.5 for non-travel voucher redemption
Zero forex markup on international spends
Metal card for primary and add-on cardholders
District by Zomato and premium concierge benefits as per current Kotak programme

salaried: Available to Kotak Solitaire Program customers subject to bank approval
selfEmployed: Available to Kotak Solitaire Program customers subject to bank approval
